center.name: 巴丹塔島
center.summary: 巴丹塔島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Beautiful fruit dove、Blue-black kingfisher、Dusky lory，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The beautiful fruit dove is distributed in rainforests of New Guinea and the islands of Batanta, Waigeo, Salawati and Misool in West Papua, Indonesia, primarily in flat terrain.{{Cite journal |last=Diamond |first=Jared |last2=Bishop |first2=K

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in New Guinea and offshore islands of Salawati, Batanta and Yapen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |last5=Joseph |first5=Leo |date=2015 |title=Molecular phylogenetics suggests a New Guinean origin and frequent episodes of founder-event speciation in the nectarivorous lories and lorikeets (Aves: Psittaciformes) |url=https://linkinghub.elsevier.com/retrieve/pii/S1055790315001232 |journal=Molecular Phylogenetics and Evolution |language=en |volume=90 |pages=34–48 |doi=10.1016/j.ympev.2015.04.021|pmid=25929786 |bibcode=2015MolPE..90...34S |url-access=subscription }} It is native to New Guinea and the offshore islands of Batanta, Salawati and Yapen, where it inhabits a wide range of lowland and montane forest habitats
